title: Certificate of dissolution; assets omitted from liquidation; post-dissolution proceedings
doc_html:
§148.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Acts 1984, No. 715, §1, eff. July 12, 1984; Acts 1992, No. 447, §4; Acts 1997, No. 293, §1; Acts 1997, No. 1172, §1, eff. June 30, 1997; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
